review_text: Fantastic location, beautiful staff, tidy park. Will definitely be back!

Lovely park, great caretakers.  Clean amenities and good, well set up camp kitchen. Laundry machines only $4 a load! Bargain.  Supermarket is a short bike ride down the street.  BEST ride around the bay to Bowen's famous beaches. Green lush parks. Markets on Sundays next door which where wonderful.  So loved the beaches, pusbike riding. Parks not set up for unpowered vans and seemed always to be in the shade of trees so batteries always low. Dog friendly. Pool looked wonderful but didn't go in.

Lovely and wonderful Holiday Park. We came without booking and became such a warm and friendly welcome by the staff. We enjoyed the views, sunsets and tours with the rental bikes. Thank you guys, you do an amazing job and best greetings from Switzerland.
Stunning caravan park. Staff were so friendly. Beachfront sites were amazing. Park is very well kept and amenities were always clean. Highly recommend checking these guys out.
One of the best places that we have stayed at.  Matt and Dee are so accomodating.  Rooms are clean and well presented.   View is spectacular!  Highly recommend.
Beautifully appointed, beds were A class
Beautiful location and excellent facilities

I was so content in the van park, I extended my stay for another 3 nights, a total of 7 in all. Great position on the bay, very well kept and a great location for rest, sightseeing and/or evenings out. Material on the park, local attractions and food was very comprehensive.  The managers, Matt and Dee, were a delight to deal with, themselves entertaining. Thanks for looking after me so well! I'll be back.
Small peaceful park. Safe and good location. The young man on reception was so welcoming and friendly.
The receptionist, Luke, was an absolute legend. Friendly guy, very knowledgeable and a good laugh. Great location, would stay here again if I come back to Bowen!
Great easy place. Pulled up in the van, large sites, great views of the beach, clean pool and amenities
Coming back 5 yrs later still great location nice clean rooms friendly helpful staff. Only thing I could add maybe some more outdoor activities for the kids during the holidays
loved it . quite  clean friendly locals, no riff raff

We booked in with our caravan and stayed for a week. The Managers and staff were extremely helpful, cheerful and friendly, really made you feel welcome. The site was very clean and well laid out. All in all a great place to stay we give it 15 out of 10 will definitely go back. Dawn and Iain Bevis
Absolutely perfect location with very friendly and helpful staff. Will definitely be back.
This resort is amazing! Right on the water with its own pool and open sites for caravans and campers. Beautiful cabins and well maintained.

A great place to stay , we have stayed here 4 times and never have been disappointed.
The staff and management are great assets to the park and do a great job,  they communicate very well with all guests and are super friendly
The amenities are always clean and tidy,  the  pool is well maintained,  BBQ area is always spotless.
This park is would recommend to anyone travelling through Bowen.
Awesome park, great location and very well kept. Very Comprehensive support material about the park and local attractions and food offering. Will be back again

Honestly this is such a hidden gem! We visit Bowen monthly for clinics and have been staying elsewhere. I had stayed here years ago for a footy comp and thought why not give it another go. Greeted by such a friendly face who was so welcoming at the reception (might I also add the reception has local gifts you can purchase!) and then to find our room was clean, shower water pressure was AMAZING and the pool was right outside our door!

The beds were so comfy and we slept really well! Internet was here and there but that wasn’t their issue they very clearly explained it in the info sheet and they were right as it gets later and more people are using it slows down.

Had a read of the info sheet they give you and that taught me that it’s owned by a local couple, their young son and their pooch! We love supporting local and will definitely be making this our regular spot!

Staff on arrival super friendly.  Park was well maintained and information provided informative.   However, the single bed sheets in the cabin were stained and looked like they had not been cleaned.  Hair was found throughout both beds as well.
Perfect location, tidy, friendly and highly recommend. Stayed 3 weeks in our caravan and can't wait to return.

Powered grass site. One van and one tent. Park is decent. Amenities are a bit old and in need of a refresh. Cleanliness of the amenities could have been a little better. They weren't gross but not always as clean as they could be. Perfect spot on the beach with access to parks and bike way just out the gate.  Great camp kitchen. Overall good value for a quick night or 2.
We just stayed here for the weekend what a find so peaceful and relaxing diffently will be returning had family villa very clean and comfortable amenities are well looked after and clean 5 star

Stayed in caravan,
Great location,excellent walking a long beach front.
Beautiful place to stay.
Lovely clean cabin.  Great location. The pool was so good. Grounds were tidy a day well kept.
The cabin was good other than a single air Co ditio er control for both rooms.,  the site feels a bit old, but not neglected.
Stayed over a week longer than planned.  Lovely park, awesome staff all really friendly. Amenities spotless and a lovely breeze.  Perfect spot for relaxation, nice pool.

We came to this park in July 2025. With out booking. Passing through, we looked at all the other parks first. But they were packed in like sardines. Thank god, they had a 2 bdrm cabin for 2 nights only. A good size Cabin. Not many van or RV sites. But what they do have are spacious compared to other sites between here and Cairns. Also in the camp kitchen they have a big screen TV. And table and chairs. The cabin has queen bed in 1 room & 2 single beds in the second room. All beds were made. A/C in all rooms. Good size lounge, dining & kitchen. Kitchen utilities, steak knives etc. No noisy mine workers here. Just peace and quiet. Nice cool breeze late afternoon. Big pool, clean amenities, cheap coin operated washing machines. I would feel very comfortable riding a push bike in Bowen. Slow traffic. Big park rite next door for the kids to kick a ball or ride a bike. The owners/ manager are very friendly. It’s always very dry here, Bowen misses out on a lot of storms and rainy periods. Even in summer. I also recommend the Atherton holiday park and caravans in Atherton. When travelling north, we stopped at the well reviewed Babinda Butcher. Just north of Innisfail. And the famous Babinda Bakery. And for fresh cooked seafood, you can’t go past, Innisfail Seafoods. With a popular Coffee Bar rite next door and a beautiful park with clean amenities. Popular with camper vans and caravans.
Compact, but clean site.
Clean tidy and well kept park.
Just a lovely place to stay
Quiet small caravan park with beach access, swimming pool, grass sites. Sites are very wide but a little tight to reverse into. But for $35 you can't complain

I cannot recommend this park highly enough, the staff and managers are the most friendliest we have come across in a while. The park amenities and grounds are spotless. Added bonus is the beautiful ocean view right at the front of the doorstep. Access to the park next door through a coded gate and were lucky enough to be there when the town markets were on.
Would definitely stay here again.
Thanks Dee and Crew
Nice park, friendly people, clean amenities but  very tight sites make parking and exiting stressful for  vans a bit larger than average.

Powered sites. Clean, all amenities. Busy but quiet. Amicable neighbours. Beach front is the main event, beautiful big, rocky/sandy beach with leafy, green parks on the foreshore as far as I walked. Pleasant brief stay

Right on the beach at Bowen, many different sites available.  We were luck enough to have a water front site. They are drive through sights but you have to disconnect your van and drive to the rear of the van to park. If you car not a competent backer and have difficulty reversing your van  don't take a sea frontage site. BBQ, access to the beach and covered picnic tables are along the foreshore.
Great caravan park! Always staff keeping the grounds nice and tidy, bathrooms are very clean and staff are super friendly. Bonus you can take your dog!

We stayed 3 nights in a one bedroom cabin, the cabin is old and in desperate need of a renovation.  It also needed a good clean, the ceiling fan was dirty and the oven tray had food crumbs from previous customers. The couch needed replacing but thankfully the bed was comfortable. The location is great as you can walk to Horseshoe Bay easily and the cabins face the ocean views.  We were advised on arrival that the cabin next door was having the floor replaced so there was a lot of noise but our floor also had a soft spots so perhaps it is the start of badly needed renovations.

Très belle étape dans l’immensité Australienne!
Un bungalow spacieux bort de mer et vue sur l’océan très propre , beau jardin , derrière nous un caravaning avec des gens fort sympathique , une piscine grande et propre et un accueil très pro et souriant. Évidemment je recommande cette étape à Bowen
Lovely staff and amazing location.
We only stayed here 1 night and the wind was blowing its guts out but the location is beautiful. Would recommend this spot to anyone
So friendly … great spot … and they let my puppies stay 😍😍 perfect … amenities great too ♥️♥️

Fantastic location lovely spot.
Great for a refresh heading north.

Great overnighter stay right on the beach. Clean, well maintained facilities. Nice walking track up to Horseshoe Bay Beach that starts just outside the back entrance. Very small sites but didn’t have any issues getting in or out.
Well run clean & tidy park with great facilities & friendly staff.  Fabulous spot on the beach front!  Awesome.

Staying here for 2 weeks in a powered site- site 11 on the waterfront. Absolutely magnificent caravan park- if you are staying in Bowen stay here. Staff very vice and helpful- position of park is brilliant- can walk to town
Very small sites. Front desk customer service was great.
Good rooms for the price and size however were a little dirty, beside that its in a good location to the beach and Sunday markets

We booked a family cabin for a one night stay. Location was perfect, two bedroom cabin was clean, neat and very comfortable. Staff were so welcoming and waved hello to us and our young kids. The kids room was clean and well stocked. We will absolutely be returning for a longer stay and will always recommend this place!
Beautiful spot, second time returning- great bang for buck!

Great. Good size cabin and everything you'd expect.  Kitchen, lounge,dining, two bedrooms, loo and a bathroom.  The bathroom looks a little tired, no shelf for bots n bobs and a tad small, but that's being fussy.  Still a great option for a business trip.
Awesome park, very clean amenities and friendly staff. Pool is lovely and right on the beach. Loved it.
Great caravan spot

Terrific little park, right on the beach, quiet, safe, well maintained, check in process was easy, not to far from anywhere.
Would highly recommend this place.
Clean and tidy..service is excellent...right next to the beach
Best sites on the waterfront . Watch the sun rise and set over the ocean.

Perfect location and close to all attractions in Bowen, amenities are spotless and grounds also. Matt and Dee are excellent managers and very friendly and I think it was their son who is a little character, soo friendly
Highly recommend staying here
Awesome caravan park right on the beach. You can watch the sunset and sunrise over the water from the same spot. Managers are incredibly helpful and friendly.
Wonderful location, friendly and helpful staff and perfect rooms, all the facilities needed. Pool also wonderful 😊 10/10
Schöner Campingplatz direkt am Strand. Wenn man das Glück hat und einen Platz in der ersten Reihe, hat man einen traumhaften Blick auf die Bucht
Great Powered site, wifi excellent, welcoming hosts. Great views, would stay again

One of the best campsites in QLD, incredibly clean and well kept. Air conditioned kitchen with an actual oven, great view, super friendly staff and pool with a shade over. We arrived late and left in the morning but check in was seamless, wish that we had stayed longer.

This park is the best, thanks to its incredible team. We had a fantastic experience staying in the family room and have made it a yearly tradition. The place is always spotless, with functioning air conditioners, multiple cooking items and cleaning items. The pool is clean and has been upgraded with toys for the kids. There's plenty of space, making access to everything in Bowen easy. Dave was exceptional during our recent visit; when I forgot our SUP paddle, he went out of his way to arrange a loaner for us. We're looking forward to returning in the future! Great hidden gem of QLD!
Great place but only 4 toilets for the entire camp is not going to cut it.
Top class service and accommodation

Thank you to Matt, Dee and the team for a fantastic  2 week stay. Fabulous location , very clean amenities  including disabled access showers and toilets. The friendly team always willing to help out. Would very highly recommend  staying here whilst in Bowen.
Great caravan park right on the water not far from town nice beach

Unser dritter Aufenthalt im NRMA Bowen Beachfront Holiday Park – diesmal im Oktober 2024 nach unseren Besuchen in 2019 und 2023 – war wieder perfekt! Die Lage direkt am Strand ist einfach unschlagbar und bietet die perfekte Kulisse für erholsame Tage und traumhafte Sonnenuntergänge.

Die Anlage ist sauber und gepflegt, und die Stellplätze sind grosszügig und komfortabel. Das gesamte Team ist stets freundlich und hilfsbereit, und man spürt, dass hier viel Wert auf die Zufriedenheit der Gäste gelegt wird. Die Nähe zu schönen Stränden und Freizeitmöglichkeiten macht diesen Platz ideal für einen unvergesslichen Urlaub.

Für uns ist dieser Campingplatz in Bowen ein absoluter Lieblingsort, den wir immer wieder gerne besuchen. Vielen Dank an das Team für die konstant hohe Qualität!
Great park, beautiful people to deal with, loved the view, and everything so clean

My parents are staying here whilst visiting me on holidays in my caravan. This is their second time staying.
Amenities are good, numerous BBQs around the park, the pool is refreshing and very kid friendly as there is no deep end, but still deep enough for adults to swim.
Sites are lovely with palm trees beside each site for added shade. Great place all round.
Water front is absolutely devine, fenced for safety. Have spotted a few turtles 🐢
Would definitely recommend!
Great park right on the beach front. Had a relaxing few days.

A crew of 6 families came up for the week for the Don River Dash race and were immediately welcomed by Dee + Matt at late hours in the night (after check in had closed) to back our trailers in and find our campsites.
It was unreal to have such clean amenities, bath mats provided for showers and clean/empty bins around the whole park!

Unfortunately our final day of the stay didn’t end well due to 3 of our boys in hospital with pretty serious injuries from the race. However- Dee + Matt helped all of us load trailers, entertain kids and relieve the stress we were all feeling being 25+ hours away from home!
Loved everything about this park and now have a great excuse to come up North again :)

We really enjoyed our stay here for a couple of days while travelling home. Dee went over and above to make us feel welcome and locate us into a site suitable for our motor home. Great location spotless amenities and lovely walks but my husband commented on having toweling shower mats “what a fantastic idea”
Great job Dee and Matt have done with this great park
We will definitely be back on next trip north
Right on the beach, fabulous pool, spotless amenities, very friendly & helpful staff.

Stan and I have just spent 3 months at NRMA BEACHFRONT BOWEN QLD. Let me tell you people if you want to stay at a 1st class caravan park, and you like being treated like family, this park ticks all the boxes. Just a heads up the showers in both female and male bathroom provides clean bath mats for those who choose to use them, we haven't so far  found another caravan park along the whole of the East Coast of Australia that provide that service. Also nothing is an issue for Matt and Dee and their staff to resolve in a quick and efficient manner. We  hope that Matt and Dee stay on and manage the park. All amenities are cleaned and well kept every day. Staff are vety welcoming, efficient and friendly.  Stan and I thoroughly recommend this park only issue is it gets too busy cause it's popular and the evening sunsets are the perfect photo opportunity. Bowen is a great place to visit. Xxx  we've already  booked our site for 3 or more months again xxx

We enjoyed our stay at Bowen NRMA, very tidy with excellent amenities. Sites are tight however we stayed on a grass site (3 of them) and had plenty of room. Note there is not a swimming beach out front but 2 kms to Horseshoe Bay. Plenty of parkland beside the caravan park.
Excellent holiday  .
Nice clean and well situated park. Excellent facilities.

Clean, facility, friendly, popular.
Bit squashy Pur plot is small but fine.

Beautiful views, spotlessly clean, very comfortable beds, friendly staff beautiful pool. BBQ with views to write home about. Shopping centre just 1 k, cafes, beaches, walks. Main Street specialty shops 2 ks. Make use of free bus service to and from hotels so you all can enjoy a drink with dinner.
Clean amenities, sites are a little tight if you have a big van, most are drive through. Managers are friendly and offer some "advice on where to fish."

Very friendly customer service and changed our cabin to accommodate mobility requirements we were so greatly for this. |The cabin was comfortable and so close to water, we really enjoyed the seating along the water front. |The market held right next to the park was really nice. |Definitely would stay again it was quiet, convenient and cosy
Sad to see Long-term stays 😢 r gone 😢 Really NRMA
Very clean & tidy Park. Good sites. Right on beach front. Manager & reception staff friendly & helpful. Loved the bath mats !!

Great location, right on the beach. Beach front powered sites have uninterrupted ocean views.
Pretty small sites though and you will want to practice your parallel parking skills, especially for the beachfront sites where parking your car is tight.
There are 2 covered picnic tables and 2 electric BBQ's on a grassed area looking out to the water.
Amenities are great. Very clean with glass shower screens and plenty of hooks and places to put your clothes, etc. They even provide bath mats which is a nice touch.
Front office sells ice creams and drinks.
It's a small park which is nice as it means it is not as busy as your standard Big 4 type park.
There is a nice big covered swimming pool too.
Next door is a really nice park and there is a path that takes you all the way to Horseshoe Bay where there is a Cafe and also where a lot of walks start from. It is probably a 20min walk to this point.
Only a few mins drive to town.
Nice sunsets.
Would recommend.
Staff were fantastic very clean and great location

Great location - Exceptional Service, Highly Recommend.
Very nice Park. Very Clean Facilities.
Booked in for 5 nights. Extremely happy with everything

Nice park in a great location.
I just hate the way they pack you in like sardines..
If you have a big van don't bother.
We saw one big van come in attempted to park and left.
Very busy with backpackers that stay up all night in the camp kitchen.

Enjoyed our time here👍.

Friendly, welcoming service.

Great location, adjacent to Queens Beach.

Close / central to all essential services - shopping,  fuel, etc.
Great park and beautiful spot.  We had a beachfront site.  Family of magpies, lorikeets, kookaburras all having a chat around us.  Pet friendly too.  Highly recommended 😊😊😊

Located on the beachfront.  Views are amazing and would be hard to beat.  We only had a short stay in one of the cabins.  The cabins whilst tidy definitely could use some tlc soon.  Plenty of green space for the kids and a large pool to swim.  Staff were friendly and helpful.  There is a camp kitchen which has everything you need.  Woolworths is close by if you need any supplies.  Good spot for star gazing over the ocean at night whilst you enjoy the use of the bbqs along the water front.  Prices are good.

Very great and friendly communication from reception.
The beach front villa that we stayed in was excellent.
It was a very relaxing environment all round.
I even caught 2 trevally,1 grunta and a stingray straight in front of the villa we stayed in.
We will be definitely staying again and highly recommend anyone looking for a great get away,to stay there.10 out of 10 from me.
Fabulous park,clean,tidy friendly. Loved it

Superbe nuit passée dans ce camping ! Accueil au top (la manager nous a donné plein de tips pour la suite de notre voyage). Les facilities étaient très bien, la piscine très propre, tout comme les sanitaires et la cuisine. Petit plus avec la localisation au bord de mer !
Lovely place excellent pool

NRMA beachfront park is a very pleasant place to stay.  The park and facilities are kept very clean. The staff are very friendly and helpful. We camped in a tent along with our 🐕. The grassed area was totally flat and easy to pitch a tent quickly. It's absolutely beachfront in location, perfect for walking the  🐕 . There's also a park nearby. The campers kitchen has all facilities and was spotless. It closely resembled an office kitchen where I once worked. The swimming pool is quite large but barely over 1m in depth. All the same plenty of room for a decent swim.

We stayed 3 nights, first time in our caravan. Perfect place to test things out. Dee and Matt were extremely helpful. We had issues with our battery and they went above and beyond to help us. We will definitely be back.
Perfect weekend getaway location! Our 2bedroom cabin was lovely and spacious. The pool was amazing and the staff were super friendly 👌
Great view and pool! Nice staff.

Lovely spot
On our camper van trip

Had a 3 night powered site stay in this wonderful caravan park. Our spot was right at the end by the park and opposite the sea.  Could get to the park through the gate.  Best view by far.  BBQ area was very clean and was all the amenities. As we were just in front of the second cyclone within weeks, there were only two caravans there, including us.  Very quiet and the dogs loved sitting out on the grass just watching the day go by.  Fantastic walk to Horseshoe bay to a great little cafe on the beach. The whole park was extremely clean and the pool was awesome.  The kitchen area was amazing, even had a slow cooker there for visitors to use. And the views, wow.  Most definitely stay again, longer this time.

This place is a little paradise on earth, in front of the beach. You can start the walking track from the camping, it's very well located. The amenties and the swiming pool are very clean, there is a super well furnished kitchen, which is perfect when you have a tente. The owners are super nice, there is a super Lovely atmosphere in this place. The best in Bowen!!

Our stay here was a very last minute decision however it didn’t disappoint at all. The staff were fantastic and were always looking after the sites/facilities. Great ocean walks/views. One of the workers even gave out icypoles to the kids during movie night! Little things like this that made it a memorable stay here. Will be back here again.

For a family holiday the NRMA Bowen Beachfront Holiday Park is great, it offers a large pool for everyones level of swimming, the cabins are fully airconditioned and bbqs around if needed. We enjoyed our three day adventure in bowen due to our stay at this park, the amenities offered was needed in the Bowen heat and allowed for a place to relax after the day. Recommend for all family members.

Amenities need fans to work - and need upgrading to turbo size / speed - they are literally sauna like currently - despite the famous Bowen breezes.

Good park - allthough packed in - good location - great town.
Always room for improvement in any caravan park but these guys are almost there
Lovely little place right on the water. Small and basic but well loved and maintained. Good little pool, fantastic views. We would have loved to stay longer!

Great spot near to the beach, park well kept, nice and  quiet, and great customer service, felt welcome. Amenities could do with bit of modernisation bit will be back again. Really happy with my stay,  really nice spot thanks so much. It is a bit of hidden gem

Beautiful spot! Packed in quite tight, but well set-out. Palms trees between sites, and lovely picnic tables & BBQ areas right at waterfront for all to share. Noisy start to the morning as everyone packed to leave, with diesel engines idling patiently...ah, the serenity!😜
Loved staying here 10/10

Great location and service but really tight spots. We have an 18’ van & a RAM & it was difficult to set up. We had to play musical cars with everyone around us. Staff did a great job resolving our problem

We were to stay 4 nights, ended up there for 12!
This is my absolute favourite place.
Friendly staff, no issue in extending our stay.
Ocean front.
Only down side is it can be tight to try and park when full.
Park right beside
Close to shops
Very disappointed in having caravan neighbours with large barking dog. Management, no help, would only text message. No policy for "barking dogs or dogs off leash."Left a day early.
Stay in the caravan park great amenities clean park nice pool
On water front, but Rocky beach.

Wir haben anfangs Oktober diesen Jahres 1 Nacht auf diesem wunderbar gelegenen Campground verbracht und konnten dank der tollen Unterstützung des Personals auf einen direkt am Strand gelegenen Powered Site wechseln. Wir kannten diesen Campground schon von unseren früheren Reisen in den Jahren 2017 und 2019 und hoffen, bald einmal erneut dorthin zurückkehren zu dürfen.
Beautiful!!! We stayed in beachfront powered site!! Great pathway for bicycle ride all the way to horseshoe bay!!! A definite stay while in Bowen!

Very tidy park.  I would highly recommend this place to stay.  The sites are very close together and definitely hard for caravan drivers to get their van in place, but everyone seems friendly, laid-back and considerate. As for perfect views of the ocean, this place is the best in Bowen.

What a great holiday! |We stayed for 2.5 weeks in August, Ryan and Rosie have got this place humming. From the moment we arrived we felt like family. Nothing is a problem for these two. The sites and grounds, pool etc are very well maintained and the staff are all very friendly. There is a very well equipped camp kitchen and BBQ’s can be found around the park. Every Sunday morning R&R we’re there cooking us complimentary egg and bacon rolls and Rosie taught us all how to make Philippino spring rolls 😋|Right at the end of the park is a gate which takes you to a magnificent park and on to the beach walkway which take you right the way to Horseshoe Bay. Markets are held in the park every Sunday morning. |This park is quite small but has got to be one of the best NRMA parks we’ve stayed at.

Stunning views of Queens Bay. Staff friendly and helpful. Drive through sites an added bonus especially for elderly travellers. Safe for children. Plenty of BBQs with great views and sunset drinks a must on the foreshore. Toilet block getting outdated and needs an upgrade which will be another bonus.

Excellent Park right on the beachfront. Clean amenities and nice resort style pool. Sites are a little crammed but most parks are these days. Caravan site was ok but We booked on the fly so were  very lucky to get a couple of nights as the grey nomads take up all the space at this time of year. Pathway for walking or bike ride to horseshoe bay which was really enjoyable. Views were spectacular and sunsets and sunrises everyday were superb. I loved this park. We will definitely be back. Highly recommended.
Good park, very squeeezy.
Beachfront cabins zijn fantastisch
Beautiful Beach to amble along

The room we had was fairly dirty. Shower could have been cleaned better. The fridge smelled like someone had left seafood in it for a week it was so strong it made the little milk in the carton smell bad. Like surely they would have smelt that when they opened to clean it out. Screen door at the front was all ripped like someone had broken in. The light in the bathroom didn't work. The bed was super hard and uncomfortable and pillows were terrible. Pool is basic but the beach front is really nice. They should really put security screens on the windows so you could leave them open during the day instead of running the Aircon all the time. It was a nice stay just could have been better if the time were cleaned better.

Stayed only one night due to being booked out|I found this park to be immaculate from the time I walked into the office to make a inquiry |I really loved the park so I rang later on to make a booking knowing I could only have one night|The owners/managers were so friendly and the staff |Clean amenities |Beautiful pool|Level concrete sites|BBQs overlooking the ocean |Spectacular sunsets from the park |Can’t praise this park enough
Clean quiet and an amazing location. The hospitality from the owners is awsome. Fantastic place to stay for people of all ages.

Handy location on water front. Big pool. Staff friendly. Close to town centre. Caravan spots a tad small. Not a big park. Had to continually ask others to move cars so we could get out. Amenities clean but closed at night don't know if this is normal or not. Enjoyable stay.

Amazing ! Really clean!
walkway to the beach, fishing spot and Sunday market !
We definitely enjoy our stay , Mathias&Bella
